creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
philip      2007-03-11 20:02:26 UTC

  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:
    usr.sbin/moused      Makefile moused.8 moused.c 
  Log:
  Add dynamic acceleration to moused(8).  This introduces a '-A' flag to control
  the acceleration algorithm.  It can be used together with the '-a' flag for
  regular acceleration.
  
  PR:             bin/110003
  Submitted by:   Oliver Fromme <olli -at- lurza.secnetix.de>
  MFC after:      1 week
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.9       +2 -2      src/usr.sbin/moused/Makefile
  1.61      +45 -0     src/usr.sbin/moused/moused.8
  1.78      +69 -6     src/usr.sbin/moused/moused.c
